def handle_event(event_type, mode):
    # Correct: use a dispatch table or split into specific handlers to reduce complexity
    handlers = {
        "upload": upload_handler,
        "delete": delete_handler
    }
    handler = handlers.get(event_type)
    if handler:
        handler(mode)

def upload_handler(mode):
    if mode == "async": ...
    else: ...
